style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A simple scorecard panel with a header reading THE SCORECARD and three stacked rows labelled READINESS, SYSTEM HEALTH, and COST. Beside each row sits a small arrow indicator pointing up or down. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A simple scorecard panel with a header reading THE SCORECARD and three stacked rows labelled READINESS, SYSTEM HEALTH, and COST. Beside each row sits a small arrow indicator pointing up or down. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
